title: disttask: add index error——global task manager is not initialized
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `users` ( `user_id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `username` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, `email` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`user_id`), UNIQUE KEY `idx_username` (`username`)) ENGINE=OceanBase;

CREATE TABLE `orders` ( `order_id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `user_id` INT NOT NULL, `amount` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`order_id`), FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`user_id`)) ENGINE=OceanBase;
key_bug_features: alter table add index with global task manager off
